name: Common Market
description: '''Common Market''' is an American [[Hip hop music|hip hop]] duo based in [[Seattle]], [[Washington (state)|Washington]], active from 2005 through 2009 and from 2019 to present. Both members, [[Disc Jockey|DJ]]/[[Music producer|Producer]] [[Sabzi (musician)|Sabzi]] (Saba Mohajerjasbi) and [[Master of Ceremonies|MC]] [[RA Scion]] (Ryan Abeo), had been active hip hop artists in the [[Pacific Northwest]] for three years before they combined their talents in 2005 to form Common Market. Together they have released two albums, three EPs, and have gone on several tours.
